text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Isolation of the load-bearing approval rules. Resolve chain

-> eligible approver found? (no -> BadRequest, stage blocked, no fallback) -> within auto-approval threshold? (FINANCE and totalAmountInBase <= approvalLimit, inclusive; limit sourced from Req-Dept approver, can diverge from selection limits) -> auto-approve (logged, no second pers

on, recurse to Management) OR nearest-bucket selection then manual. Nearest bucket: effective limit = approvalLimit ?? 200000; eligible iff >= amount; keep the MINIMUM eligible bucket; tie-break least-loaded urgency-weighted (ASAP=4 / SameDay=2 / Within2Days=1 /
Within1Week=0). Reassignment/delegation on leave. postValueSync reverts an auto-approved FINANCE/MANAGEMENT completion to AWAITING_APPROVAL only when payTerms or paymentSchedules change.
